consumption_rule: Vendor PhysmathLemmas/ThreeInfinities.lean into the mother repository only after the required budget hypotheses exist; do not add this satellite as a Lake dependency of the sorry-free core.

public_declarations.name: tsum_geometric_le_of_le
inputs: r q : ENNReal
hrq : r <= q

public_declarations.name: rootedTripleInfinity_closure_le
inputs: H : Nat -> Nat -> iota -> ENNReal
epsilon : Nat -> ENNReal
w : iota -> ENNReal
M L K q G : ENNReal
hH : forall k n Y, H k n Y <= M * epsilon k * (L * epsilon k) ^ n * w Y
hq : forall k, L * epsilon k <= q
hw : tsum Y, w Y <= K
hepsilon : tsum k, epsilon k <= G
public_declarations.conclusion: tsum (k : Nat) (n : Nat) (Y : iota), H k n Y <= M * G * K * (1 - q)^-1

public_declarations.name: rootedTripleInfinity_closure_le_exp
inputs: H : Nat -> Nat -> iota -> ENNReal
epsilon g : Nat -> ENNReal
w : iota -> ENNReal
M L K q A G0 : ENNReal
c0 t : Real
hH : forall k n Y, H k n Y <= M * epsilon k * (L * epsilon k) ^ n * w Y
hq : forall k, L * epsilon k <= q
hw : tsum Y, w Y <= K
hprofile : forall k, epsilon k <= A * ENNReal.ofReal (Real.exp (-(c0 * t))) * g k
hg : tsum k, g k <= G0
public_declarations.conclusion: tsum (k : Nat) (n : Nat) (Y : iota), H k n Y <= M * A * K * G0 * (1 - q)^-1 * ENNReal.ofReal (Real.exp (-(c0 * t)))

public_declarations.name: tsum_prod_nnnorm_le_of_rootedLeafBudget
inputs: E : Type* with SeminormedAddCommGroup E
H : Nat -> Nat -> iota -> E
epsilon : Nat -> NNReal
w : iota -> NNReal
M L K q G : NNReal
hH : forall k n Y, nnnorm (H k n Y) <= M * epsilon k * (L * epsilon k) ^ n * w Y
hq : forall k, L * epsilon k <= q
hw : tsum Y, (w Y : ENNReal) <= K
hepsilon : tsum k, (epsilon k : ENNReal) <= G
public_declarations.conclusion: tsum p : Nat x Nat x iota, (nnnorm (H p.1 p.2.1 p.2.2) : ENNReal) <= (M : ENNReal) * G * K * (1 - (q : ENNReal))^-1

public_declarations.name: summable_of_rootedLeafBudget
inputs: E : Type* with SeminormedAddCommGroup E and CompleteSpace E
H : Nat -> Nat -> iota -> E
epsilon : Nat -> NNReal
w : iota -> NNReal
M L K q G : NNReal
hH : forall k n Y, nnnorm (H k n Y) <= M * epsilon k * (L * epsilon k) ^ n * w Y
hq : forall k, L * epsilon k <= q
hq1 : q < 1
hw : tsum Y, (w Y : ENNReal) <= K
hepsilon : tsum k, (epsilon k : ENNReal) <= G
public_declarations.conclusion: Summable (fun p : Nat x Nat x iota => H p.1 p.2.1 p.2.2)

public_declarations.name: norm_tsum_le_of_rootedLeafBudget
inputs: E : Type* with SeminormedAddCommGroup E and CompleteSpace E
H : Nat -> Nat -> iota -> E
epsilon : Nat -> NNReal
w : iota -> NNReal
M L K q G : NNReal
hH : forall k n Y, nnnorm (H k n Y) <= M * epsilon k * (L * epsilon k) ^ n * w Y
hq : forall k, L * epsilon k <= q
hq1 : q < 1
hw : tsum Y, (w Y : ENNReal) <= K
hepsilon : tsum k, (epsilon k : ENNReal) <= G
public_declarations.conclusion: norm (tsum p : Nat x Nat x iota, H p.1 p.2.1 p.2.2) <= ((M * G * K * (1 - q)^-1 : NNReal) : Real)
